description_long: This is a medium-sized, slightly worn cardboard shipping box with visible water stains and scuff marks, suggesting it has been handled and possibly exposed to the elements. The box is sealed with brown packing tape that runs across the top and down the sides, with the word 'POSTAL' printed on the tape. On the side, there is a white graphic of a toilet and the words 'POSTAL EXPRESS' in bold white and blue letters, giving the box a humorous or novelty appearance. The cardboard surface shows realistic texturing, including creases, dents, and discoloration from moisture. Additional markings, such as a CE symbol and handling icons, are visible on the lower side, indicating it is intended for shipping or delivery. The overall look is utilitarian, with a touch of playful branding.
description: A worn, taped cardboard shipping box with 'POSTAL EXPRESS' and a toilet graphic, featuring water stains and handling marks.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the 'POSTAL EXPRESS' text, toilet graphic, and prominent water stains on the cardboard.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the taped seam, toilet graphic, and more subtle water stains on the upper surface.
description_view_2: Back-left view with the 'POSTAL EXPRESS' text partially visible, tape seam, and handling icons on the lower side.
description_view_3: Back-right view focusing on the tape, water stains, and the edge of the 'POSTAL EXPRESS' text.
